name: d3-hierarchy
when_to_use: 需要从嵌套数据计算 tidy tree、cluster、treemap、pack 或 partition/sunburst 几何时用它而非手写布局,因为原生在面积守恒、节点避碰、紧凑排布与层级坐标计算上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能写嵌套列表,做不到面积正确的 treemap、无重叠圆形 pack、紧凑 tidy tree 或 partition 坐标;本 primitive 稳定把 hierarchy 变成下游 SVG/Canvas 可画的节点几何。

data_in.note: root 是递归嵌套对象;children 缺省表示叶节点。treemap/pack/partition 以 value 求和并要求非负;tree/cluster 只用拓扑关系。size 精确对应各布局的 .size([width,height])。
data_in._why_no_example: 递归 hierarchy JSON 是 AI 原生结构,布局分支已由 schema 钉死,无需 minimal example。

root.name: string
root.其余业务字段?: string | number | boolean | null —— 默认无额外字段

schema.size: [number, number] —— tree/cluster 为 [width,height],treemap/pack/partition 为布局画布尺寸
schema.padding?: number(px) —— treemap/pack 的节点间距,默认 1;其余布局忽略

provides._note: headless-primitive:只计算几何、不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵。

peer.note: 消费者是 AI 创建的 SVG/Canvas marks,或 ECharts custom series;本条不负责 DOM、样式、缩放或下钻交互。

boot.note: 这是裁剪后的共同主路径。tree/cluster 的 sum 不影响坐标;treemap/pack/partition 必须给叶节点非负 value。下游自行按布局读取 x/y/r 或 x0/y0/x1/y1。

isolation.evidence: +esm confirms named exports cluster/hierarchy/pack/partition/tree/treemap — boot imports all match. hierarchy(data).sum() + tree/cluster.size([w,h]) + treemap/pack.size().padding() + partition.size() are standard d3-hierarchy v3; outputs pure node geometry (tree/cluster x/y/depth/height, treemap/partition x0/y0/x1/y1, pack x/y/r) via .descendants()/.links(). Zero DOM/CSS/event API — headless primitive, shadow-irrelevant (safe).

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to calculate tidy tree, cluster, treemap, pack, or partition/sunburst geometry from nested data, instead of hand-writing a layout, because native implementations fail at area preservation, collision avoidance, compact packing, and hierarchical coordinate calculation.
en.why_valuable: AI can only write nested lists by default; it cannot produce an area-correct treemap, non-overlapping circle pack, compact tidy tree, or partition coordinates. This primitive reliably converts a hierarchy into node geometry that downstream SVG/Canvas can draw.

data_in.note: root is a recursively nested object; omitted children indicates a leaf. treemap/pack/partition sum value and require non-negative values; tree/cluster use topology only. size maps exactly to each layout's .size([width,height]).

root.name: string
root.children?: nodes with the same structure[] -- Default []
root.其余业务字段?: string | number | boolean | null -- No additional fields by default

schema.size: [number, number] -- [width,height] for tree/cluster; layout canvas dimensions for treemap/pack/partition
schema.padding?: number(px) -- Node spacing for treemap/pack; default 1; ignored by other layouts
